hero.title: Solar Panels
hero.subtitle: Hundreds of homeowners in Dublin and beyond have trusted BrightPeak to power their homes with clean, reliable solar energy.

whySolar.title: A Smart Investment That Pays For Itself

cards.paragraph:
Solar PV (photovoltaic) is a technology that converts sunlight into electricity using semiconductor materials in panels. "Photo" means light and "voltaic" means electricity. So the panels use the sun's light to make electricity that you can use to power your home. 
The more panels, the more electricity generated.

cards.subHeading: Does Solar work in cloudy weather?
cards.paragraph:
The panels today are very efficient. Most houses in Ireland can fit enough panels on their roof to meet a majority of their needs.  

Does it work in cloudy weather?

Yes.  This is because the panels need sunlight, not sunshine.  Ireland has a similar climate to Germany snd they have been a big solar success story.

cards.subHeading: What other equipment do I need?
cards.paragraph:
To make solar wok for your home you need two things:  

1. Solar panels and 
2. An "Inverter".  

The inverter converts the DC electricity from the panels into AC electricity for your home electrical system.

Do I need a Battery?

Adding battery storage is a great idea and can significantly help you save money and become even more independent from the grid.  Check the Battery section of this site to learn more.

As one of Ireland's leading renewable energy installers with over 18 years of experience and 2,800+ completed projects, we deliver bespoke solar solutions tailored to your home. 

We handle everything.

- We will provide and install the panels 
- We will provide and connect the Inverter
- We will handle the SEAI grants application 

All work is done by our own qualified team 
- No sub-contractors
